title: 使用 Claude Artifacts 创建 AI 驱动的应用——无需编程
author: Anthropic News
content:
Today, we’re introducing a dedicated space to view artifacts in the Claude app, and the ability to embed AI capabilities directly into your creations—transforming artifacts into interactive, AI-powered apps.

Since launch, millions of users have created over half a billion artifacts—from productivity tools to educational games—and now you can create even more interactive experiences to use and share.

Artifacts turn anyone into an app creator—no coding needed. Just tell Claude your idea to instantly create shareable apps, tools, and games.

With our latest update, you can build even more interactive experiences. For example, rather than asking Claude to create a set of flashcards for one topic, you can ask Claude to build a flashcard app that lets users pick their own topic and generate their own cards. Instead of a single-use artifact, you now have an interactive app you can use and share more broadly.

Additionally, our new artifacts space makes creation seamless:

  • Browse curated artifacts for inspiration
  • Customize existing creations in minutes
  • Build from scratch through simple conversation
  • Organize everything in one place

When conversation becomes creation

Music producer Rick Rubin captured this shift perfectly with “The Way of Code,” exploring how conversation itself becomes a form of creative expression. His project paired 81 meditations with interactive artifacts that anyone can reshape with Claude.

Getting started

Want to create a personalized storytelling app? A coding tutor that adjusts to different learning styles? A creative writing assistant? Just describe your idea to Claude.

Access the new artifacts space from the sidebar in the Claude app—it’s currently available to Free, Pro, and Max users. Whether you want to browse for inspiration, customize existing creations, or build something entirely new, the tools are at your fingertips.

You can also share artifacts for anyone to view your creations. To get the full experience, viewers can sign in to a Claude account with any plan.

The ability to embed AI capabilities directly into your artifacts is available in beta. Learn more about how to build and share AI-powered apps with Claude here.
aiSummary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Artifacts，通过对话即可创建交互式 AI 驱动的应用，无需编程。
oneSentenceSummary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Artifacts，通过对话即可创建交互式 AI 驱动的应用，无需编程。
summary: Anthropic 推出了其 Claude Artifacts 功能的增强版本，为用户提供了一个专用空间，可以直接通过对话创建和管理交互式 AI 驱动的应用程序。此次更新使所有用户，无论是否具备编程技能，都可以简单地通过向 Claude 描述他们的想法来构建功能性工具、游戏和应用。关键改进包括能够创建更具交互性的体验，例如动态抽认卡生成器；一个新的集中空间，方便用户浏览、自定义和组织 Artifacts；以及分享创作的能力。所有 Claude 用户（Free、Pro、Max）均可使用此功能，它旨在通过利用对话式 AI 降低应用创建门槛，将用户的想法转化为实用的、可分享的、具备嵌入式 AI 能力的应用。

mainPoints.point: Claude Artifacts 现在支持创建交互式 AI 驱动的应用程序。
mainPoints.explanation: 更新后的功能允许用户通过对话构建动态工具和应用，从静态输出转向交互式体验。

mainPoints.point: 使用 Artifacts 进行应用创建无需编程技能。
mainPoints.explanation: 用户只需向 Claude 描述想法，即可将其转化为可分享的应用，让非程序员也能轻松创建应用。

mainPoints.point: 新的专用空间增强了 Artifacts 管理和发现。
mainPoints.explanation: 集成的 Artifacts 空间让用户通过 Claude 应用界面，可以轻松浏览、自定义、构建和组织他们的创作。

mainPoints.point: 用户可以轻松分享他们创建的 Artifacts。
mainPoints.explanation: 该平台支持分享 AI 驱动的应用，允许他人查看并进行交互。

keyQuotes: 今天，我们将在 Claude 应用中引入一个用于查看 Artifacts 的专用空间，以及直接将 AI 能力嵌入您的创作中，从而将 Artifacts 转化为交互式 AI 驱动的应用。
Artifacts 让任何人都能成为应用创建者——无需编程。
只需将您的想法告诉 Claude，即可立即创建可分享的应用、工具和游戏。
无论您是想浏览寻找灵感、自定义现有创作，还是构建全新的东西，工具都触手可及。
